ab: cyux maki’ ngasal yaki’ su’?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: aw, cyux m’abi sa qsahuy.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: cyux maki’ ngasal yaki’ su’ ?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: ini’ kaki’ ngasal, misan wal tanux, mwah ngasal gbyan.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: cyux maki’ ngasal yutas su’?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: cyux te sazing ’rkan, hali’ hmkangi’ kya.
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: kya’ ’tayal nyux ngasal?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: Temu, bsyaq misu’ iyat kintan la, lokah su’ ga?
ch: B:是Temu阿，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s Temu. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: lokah saku’ ay, nyux saku’ mwah cisal isu’.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: cyux inu’ yaba’ su’?
en: Where is your father?

ab: cyux tmahuk ramat te phpuyan, ’say maku’ mlawa’!
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: wal inu’ qu Pepay la?
en: Where did Pepay go?

ab: wal kmzyap ngta’ sa libu’ ngta’.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: yutas, nyux sami la.
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: ini’ kaki’ ngasal qu yutas mamu, cyux qmayah, ’si’ n_ga kya ngasal..
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: mama’, nyux su’ lga.
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: bsyaq misu’ iyat kintan la, nyux su’ wagiq la.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: mqas saku’ balay mita’ isu’.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: bniq maku simu qu pngran qani, hali smi’ sa tenpingsyang.
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: bsyaq iyat su’ minnwah la, plwanay maku’ kwara’ mtswe su’ ha, aki’ mwah mplaw maniq.
ch: A:你這麼久沒來，我叫你的兄弟都來一起吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: laxi’ lnglung nanu’ la, si ta’ nbu ocya’, hala ta’ mcisal te tangha’.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: blaq balay qu innaga’ su’, hala saku’ la.
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: misan tnahuk qu ngta’ qani, aras isu’, hali’ thhway maniq ngasal.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
